element.hint: Maximum value for the radar axis scale
element.label: Max Value
element.name: max_value

element.hint: Opacity of the filled data area (0-1)
element.label: Fill Opacity
element.name: fill_opacity

element.hint: Shape of the radar grid: polygon or circle
element.label: Radar - Grid Shape
element.name: grid_shape

element.hint: Radius of data points at each axis in pixels
element.label: Point Size
element.name: point_size

element.hint: Width of the data area outline stroke in pixels
element.label: Stroke Width
element.name: stroke_width

element.hint: Number of concentric grid rings from center to edge
element.label: Number of Levels
element.name: levels

element.hint: Color of the axis labels on the radar chart
element.label: Radar - Axis Label Color
element.name: axis_label_color

element.hint: Distance of axis labels from the outermost grid line in pixels
element.label: Label Offset
element.name: label_offset
